title: Izzy's 100 Sub Texture Pack (+ Recolors)
description: The PvP texture pack with 6 DIFFERENT RECOLORS!
body:
![All Recolors available!](https://static.planetminecraft.com/files/image/minecraft/texture-pack/2021/788/14304500-recolors_l.webp)

I am bringing my texture pack from 2021 and releasing it to CurseForge! This isn't the best of my work, but I know there is a small audience that tried and like the pack. 

![Beds, Chest, Crafting table,, Enchanting Table, Swords, Wool, and more important items in this texture pack.](https://static.planetminecraft.com/files/image/minecraft/texture-pack/2025/788/19101911-izzyssubtexturepackprojectscreenshot_l.webp)

Credit to the creator of the Smooth v2 Texture Pack for inspiring the sword design.

[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/C0C51K5T37)
